form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 10th (Fr1) over 1700m at this track, beaten 30 m by Katama (2:03.30) in 2yo on December 18 at $67. May find this tough.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 2200m at this track, beaten 6 m by Miss Brabant (2:42.60) in 3yo+ FM on April 2 at $24. At her previous start good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 2200m at this track beaten 11 m by Lulana (2:44.60) in 3yo+ on March 26 at $15.50. Draws for a good showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced early when caught wide. Continued to over-race middle stages.
Hampered by breaking runners at the start.
Broke in the score up however was in position at the candy pole.
